**
Product information**

## Menzerna Sealing Wax Protection

**Menzerna Sealing Wax Protection** is a [car polish](https://www.nonpaints.com/en/car-detailing/polishing/polishing-compound) with [Carnauba wax](https://www.nonpaints.com/en/car-detailing/car-care-protection/carnauba-wax) that you apply as a sealant on the paintwork so that dirt and deposits are repelled. You often apply the Menzerna Sealing Wax Protection after car polishing to protect the paintwork from all outside influences. Applying this Menzerna Sealing Wax Protection keeps your car paintwork beautiful and scratch-free longer!

## Carnauba car polish

Do you want to **buy a Carnauba car polish** to polish the paint and immediately protect it from dirt, tar, oxidation, salt and rain? This Menzerna Sealing Wax Protection is a 1-step paint sealer that allows you to polish the car and apply a Carnauba wax. The car polish with Carnauba wax gives paint a smooth finish and showroom shine with deep reflection.

### Which polishing wheel to use?

Because the Menzerna Sealing Wax Protection is a polish and Carnauba wax in 1, we recommend using an ultra finishing polishing pad with incredibly soft foam. The super soft foam ensures even application of the car polish and does not create a paint correction so you can achieve the highest gloss!

### Features Menzerna Sealing Wax Protection

- Polishing agent and carnauba wax in 1 polish

- Gives the car a high-quality paint protection

- Brings [car paint](https://www.nonpaints.com/en/car-paint) on super gloss

- Adds extra color and depth

- Water based polish

- Does not dust

- Silicone-free

- Easy to rub out

- Suitable for ultra soft polishing pads

- Can also be used by hand

- Available in 250ml and 1 liter bottle

[
Full product information ](#)

**
Pros and cons**

- Professional car polish with Carnauba wax

- Gives car paint a brilliant bright shine

- Polish and apply a paint sealer immediately

- Can be processed by hand or with a polisher

- For paint correction you should use a heavy or medium cut compound
